heroSubtitle: A platform that connects you to wholesalers with real-time, intelligent stock visibility.
noInventoryDesc: Retailers have no way to see what a wholesaler currently has in stock.
overstockDesc: Without knowing what's available, retailers hedge by ordering more than needed.
stockoutsDesc: Fast-moving goods disappear from shelves, and the customer walks to a competitor.
signalGreenDesc: Safe to order as usual. No urgency.
signalRedDesc: Avoid depending on this item right now.
bronzeDesc: New or Unproven. Basic stock signals.
trustSubtitle: Trust earned through data, not reputation.
retailerWelcome: Welcome back, Corner Mart! Here's your personalized stock view.
orderSuccess: Order placed successfully! Pending wholesaler approval.
wholesalerDesc: Sharma Brothers Distributors. Manage incoming requests and your trust profile.
maintainAccuracy: Maintain an accuracy rate above 95% to retain your
allCaughtUp: All caught up! No pending requests.
